data.title: Coinbase launches "Next Bets" internal venture capital program to support employee innovation projects.
data.description: Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong stated that the company has established an internal venture capital program called "Next Bets," allowing employees to submit innovative projects and pitch them directly to product managers. If they receive support, the projects can be implemented. The program opens for proposals twice a year, typically executed by small teams of 2 to 3 people, focusing on high-potential areas. Armstrong said the mechanism aims to reduce the loss of excellent ideas and talent, drawing inspiration from historical cases in the tech industry. The Base blockchain project originated from this program, and more updates will be announced in the coming weeks.

data.title: FTX/Alameda Transfers ZRO Tokens to Wintermute, Price Drops
data.description:
On March 31, FTX/Alameda transferred 4.126 million ZRO tokens, valued at $8.17 million, to Wintermute, according to BlockBeats. This transaction was detected by on-chain analyst Yu Jin. Following the transfer, the price of ZRO fell by 6%, from $1.98 to $1.85, within a few hours.

The wallet still holds 30.75 million ZRO tokens, worth $58.12 million, which represents approximately 10% of the current circulating supply of ZRO.

data.description: Bitcoin has exceeded the 68,000 USDT mark, currently priced at 68,037.93 USDT. According to Foresight News, this represents a daily increase of 1.85%.

data.title: The Hawks defeated the Celtics in the NBA regular season, resulting in a profit of over $2.3 million; the account profited over $400,000 in a single game.
data.description: According to Odaily Seer, the result of the "NBA Regular Season Hawks vs. Celtics" prediction event on Polymarket has been confirmed: the Hawks won the game. The top-ranked account, weflyhigh (with accumulated profits of approximately $2.32 million), profited over $400,000 in this single game. Odaily Seer previously reported that this account had purchased approximately $510,000 worth of Hawks winning positions at approximately 56¢. With this victory, the Hawks are currently ranked 6th in the Eastern Conference, while the Celtics are ranked 2nd. Odaily Seer continues to monitor the prediction market, anticipating changes before they are priced in.

data.title: Cuba Central Bank Approves Cryptocurrency Use for International Payments
data.description:
Cuba's Central Bank (BCC) has granted approval to ten companies, including nine small and medium-sized enterprises and one joint venture, to use cryptocurrency for international payments. According to Foresight News, the license is valid for one year and can be renewed. The companies are permitted to use crypto assets solely for cross-border payments related to their main business operations. Transactions must be conducted through virtual asset service providers (VASPs) authorized by the Cuban Central Bank, and companies are required to report transaction amounts, currencies used, and intermediary service provider information to regulatory authorities on a quarterly basis.

Since 2021, the Cuban Central Bank has been regulating virtual assets. In April 2022, the use of Bitcoin and other cryptocurrency platforms was allowed, but always under official authorization. This marks the first time Cuban companies have received direct licenses to operate international payment businesses using cryptocurrencies.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 68,000 USDT with a 2.58% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 31, 2026, 01:34 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 68,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 68,330.78125 USDT, with a narrowed 2.58% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: STOCKS | China's Commercial Aerospace Sector Strengthens as Lijian-2 Rocket Launch Succeeds
data.description:
China's commercial aerospace sector saw a significant boost as several stocks surged following the successful maiden flight of the Lijian-2 carrier rocket. According to Jin10, Shenjian Co. achieved its fourth consecutive daily limit, while Shunhao Co. also hit its daily limit. Additionally, Juli Sling saw an increase of over 9%, with Tianli Composite, Aerospace Software, and Chaojie Co. also experiencing gains.

The Lijian-2 rocket's successful launch has been a key driver of this market movement, with its cost per launch being compared to that of SpaceX. This development highlights China's growing capabilities and competitiveness in the commercial aerospace industry.

data.title: Japan Implements Mandatory Climate Reporting for Major Companies
data.description: Japan is set to enforce new mandatory rules on climate reporting for major companies as part of the next phase of its national emissions trading system. Bloomberg posted on X that this initiative aims to enhance transparency and accountability in corporate environmental practices. The regulations will require companies to disclose detailed information on their carbon emissions and sustainability efforts. This move is part of Japan's broader strategy to address climate change and promote sustainable business practices. The government hopes that these measures will encourage companies to adopt greener technologies and reduce their carbon footprint. The new rules are expected to be implemented in the coming months, marking a significant step in Japan's environmental policy.

data.title: Non-Dollar Stablecoin Supply Reaches $1.2 Billion, Study Shows
data.description:
The total supply of non-dollar stablecoins has reached $1.2 billion, according to research data from Dune and Visa. According to ChainCatcher, the monthly on-chain transfer volume is approximately $10 billion, with the number of holding addresses increasing from around 40,000 at the beginning of 2023 to 1.2 million currently.

Euro stablecoins have shown the most significant growth under the MiCA regulatory framework, with monthly transaction volumes rising from $383 million to $3.83 billion year-on-year. Additionally, stablecoins denominated in currencies such as the Japanese yen, Singapore dollar, and Brazilian real are also expanding, indicating a shift from a dollar-dominated stablecoin ecosystem to a multi-currency on-chain settlement system.

data.title: Crypto Stocks Experience Broad Declines in U.S. Trading
data.description: Crypto-linked stocks saw significant declines in U.S. trading. According to NS3.AI, HODL dropped by more than 10.81%, while ALTS and ABTC fell by over 8.94% and 8.14%, respectively, as reported by msx.com data. Additionally, MARA, Strategy, and CRCL also experienced downturns.

data.title: Taiwan Stock Market Continues Downward Trend
data.description: The Taiwan stock market opened on a softer note, continuing its recent downward trend. According to RTHK, the weighted index was reported at 32,247 points earlier, marking a decline of 270 points or 0.83%.

data.title: KB Kookmin Card Collaborates with Avalanche and OpenAsset for Hybrid Payment Model
data.description: KB Kookmin Card is partnering with Avalanche and OpenAsset to create a hybrid payment model that integrates stablecoins with its existing card payment infrastructure. According to NS3.AI, this initiative seeks to facilitate digital asset payments while maintaining the current card payment system. The collaboration aims to enhance the flexibility and efficiency of transactions, offering users a seamless experience in managing both traditional and digital currencies.

data.title: Hong Kong Stocks Open Higher as Midea Group Rises Over 4%
data.description: Hong Kong stocks opened with gains, as the Hang Seng Index rose by 0.27% and the Hang Seng Tech Index increased by 0.08%. According to Jin10, Midea Group (00300.HK) saw a significant rise of over 4% in its stock price. In contrast, Pony.ai (02026.HK) experienced a decline of approximately 7%.

data.title: The US Solomon Islands (SOL) spot ETF saw a net outflow of $6.1743 million in a single day.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, the SOL spot ETF saw a net outflow of $6.1743 million yesterday (March 30th, Eastern Time). Only the Bitwise Solana Staking ETF (BSOL) experienced a net outflow yesterday, with a single-day net outflow of $6.1743 million, while its historical total net inflow has reached $792 million. As of press time, the SOL spot ETF's total net asset value is $802 million, with an SOL net asset ratio of 1.69%, and a historical cumulative net inflow of $979 million.

data.title: U.S. Stock Futures Rise as Gold Prices Increase and Oil Declines
data.description: U.S. stock futures for the three major indices have turned positive, showing gains, according to Odaily. Meanwhile, gold prices have experienced a short-term increase, while oil prices have seen a decline.

data.title: Australia Investigates Compliance of Major Social Media Platforms with Under-16 Ban
data.description: Australia's cybersecurity regulatory body is conducting an investigation into Meta Platforms Inc., Snap Inc., TikTok, and YouTube regarding their adherence to a ban on social media usage for individuals under 16 years old. According to Ming Pao, this marks the first formal assessment of how these technology giants are responding to the country's pioneering regulatory measures aimed at protecting young users. The investigation seeks to ensure compliance with the restrictions designed to safeguard minors from potential online risks.

data.title: US stocks closed lower across the board for crypto stocks, with HODL falling more than 10.81%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, at the close of trading on the US stock market, the Dow Jones Industrial Average rose 0.11%, the S&P 500 fell 0.39%, and the Nasdaq Composite fell 0.73%. The crypto sector generally declined, with HODL falling over 10.81%, ALTS falling over 8.94%, ABTC falling over 8.14%, MARA falling over 2.81%, MSTR falling over 3.64%, and CRCL falling over 4%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stock and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.
